result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare two application bundles / directories.

Usage:
  appcompare [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <args>  Paths to the first and second applications bundle/directory. If no other option is give then the text user interface will be shown.

Options:
  --output-markdown <output-markdown>  Filename for the markdown output (optional).
  --gist                               Gist the output.
  --mapping-file <mapping-file>        File that describe a custom mapping between files from both application bundles/directories.
  --obj-dirs <obj-dirs>                Pair of directories for scanning for object files, separated with a colon (optional)
  --version                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
